lineage.method: SP-F: extends v6_h10d (lsk3 + F-cascade w=0.025) by adding F1 funding_intraday_dispersion_30d (per-subject 4h-grain rolling-30d mean of within-day funding_rate std). w=-0.020. Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.

sp_f_admission_audit_2026_04_30.panel_grain: 1d aggregate of 4h binance_derivatives funding_rate (6 obs/day per subject)
sp_f_admission_audit_2026_04_30.selected_horizon: h10d (residual t 7.24 vs 5.77 at h5d, monotone-stronger consistent with SP-C h10d-preference finding)
sp_f_admission_audit_2026_04_30.weight_calibration: Sign correction after first v9 attempt at w=-0.020 failed (walk-forward dropped 0.32, regime broke). F1 raw IC is NEGATIVE (-0.019) but residual IC is POSITIVE (+0.040 vs lsk3+F08; +0.029 vs lsk3+F-cascade). Residual IC drives the sign for marginal contribution to score (not raw IC). F-cascade reference: residual IC +0.062 -> w +0.025 (ratio 0.40). F1 residual IC vs lsk3+F-cascade +0.029 -> w +0.029 × 0.50 = +0.015. Per-ts Spearman corr(F1, F-cascade) = 0.064 mean (low; not sibling-duplicate).

alternative_variants_audited.decision: secondary candidate; not stacked with F1 to avoid sibling-duplicate from same 4h funding sequence (per v7 non-additivity lesson)
FAIL G6 — collinear with F08 funding_term_skew_60 (1d-grain version absorbs the sub-day skew signal). Plumbed for diagnostic, NOT score-integrated.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: SP-F: extends v6_h10d (lsk3 + F-cascade w=0.025) with F1 funding_intraday_dispersion_30d. Per-subject 4h-grain funding sequence (6 obs/day) aggregated to daily within-day std, rolling-30d mean. Mechanism: high intraday funding dispersion = unstable/overheated carry regime; assets with elevated F1 systematically underperform in next 10 days. Sign empirical: NEGATIVE. Stacked with W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp construction as v6_h10d. Score adds +0.015 * z(funding_intraday_dispersion_30d). Sign POSITIVE per residual IC (NOT raw IC) — first v9 attempt at w=-0.020 (matching raw IC sign -0.019) failed because residual IC is positive (+0.029 vs lsk3+F-cascade); marginal contribution sign is driven by residual IC. Position size multiplied by W3.5 v2 regime-gating overlay. F1 captures sub-day funding microstructure orthogonal to F08 (1d-grain skew) AND F-cascade (G6 +0.029 t=+5.19 vs lsk3+F-cascade). Falsified if (a) walk_forward median sharpe drops more than 0.2 below v6_h10d (+2.832) without compensating regime improvement; OR (b) regime_holdout fails (worst regime below -2.828 OR positive_regime_fraction below 1/3); OR (c) F1 residual IC vs lsk3+F-cascade falls below 0.02 on this panel.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: raw = -0.20*z(iv_smooth_60) -0.10*z(rv_5) +0.18*z(dh_60) +0.15*z(dh_5) -0.07*z(tt_smooth_5) -0.10*z(liquidity_stress_qv_iv) -0.06*z(momentum_decay_5_20) +0.05*z(taker_imb_dispersion) -0.05*z(quality_funding_oi) +0.10*z(downside_upside_vol_ratio_30) +0.07*z(funding_basis_residual_implied_repo_30) +0.025*z(liq_cascade_recency_score_5d) +0.015*z(funding_intraday_dispersion_30d); final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = (long_leverage/top_K - short_leverage/bottom_K) * regime_gating_v2_multiplier(t)

experimental_reason: SP-F admission winner (G6 +0.040 t=7.24 vs lsk3+F08 at h10d). Score-integration produces NO marginal cycle improvement over v6_h10d when stacked with F-cascade — non-additivity finding. Weight scan (h10d cycles): w=-0.020 walk_forward 2.513 regime fail, w=+0.015 walk_forward 2.832 regime pass (= v6_h10d), w=+0.020 walk_forward 2.832 regime pass (= v6_h10d), w=+0.025 walk_forward 2.832 regime fail. F1's signal overlaps with F-cascade's rotation regime protection in cycle backtest space (analogous to v7 F62+F-cascade non-additivity). Locked at w=+0.015 (safest strict-pass). v9 = v6_h10d on cycle metrics; not promoted to active_alternative. v6_lsk3_g_v2_h10d remains the h10d active. F1 plumbed in panel for future use (different baseline / no F-cascade context).

w_neg_0_020.interpretation: wrong sign (raw IC sign); actively contradicts F1 residual signal

w_pos_0_015.interpretation: right sign, conservative; identical to v6_h10d (no marginal cycle value)

w_pos_0_025.interpretation: regime breaks; over-shooting F-cascade's rotation protection

verified_outcome_2026_04_30.non_additivity_finding: F1 G6 admission is real (residual IC +0.029 vs lsk3+F-cascade) but cycle-layer marginal value is zero. F1's predictive direction overlaps with F-cascade's rotation regime protection in walk-forward / regime metrics, even though per-ts Spearman corr(F1, F-cascade) is only 0.064 (mean). Analogous to v7 F62+F-cascade non-additivity (commit 68c4593).
